name: Easy Blender Potato Kugel
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend all ingredients until the potatoes are finely ground, approximately 2 minutes.
2. Pour the mixture into a pre-heated, lightly oiled 9-inch round or loaf pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for golden brown results, about 1-1/2 to 2 hours.
4. When doubling the recipe, use a 9"x13 inch pan.
